current.summary: COMPLETE — capmon IA design audit finished. All 14 items + bonus resolved. Design doc updated. Ready for implementation planning.

activeWork.description: Audit complete. Next phase: implementation planning for capmon pipeline.
activeWork.progress: All 14 audit items resolved across two sessions. Design doc updated with all panel consensus decisions. Committed and pushed (62260d3).

recentDecisions: Items 6-14 + bonus all resolved via 3-round panel (remy, spec-purist, solo-publisher, platform-vendor, registry-operator)
Hash baseline: content_hash in format doc at HEAD — CI does not read .capmon-cache/
Content validity predicate: 512B min + non-binary Content-Type + domain integrity
.md URL patterns: take-first (pattern 1 = append .md, pattern 2 = child path)
capmon check: orphan detection (non-blocking), validate-format-doc step (blocking)
Diff truncation: source_code 500 lines, all others 200 lines
Loop: polling + lockfile (60-min cron, no CI-offset), atomic writes, branch naming normative
Crash recovery: scan for capmon/* branches with no PR on startup
graduation_candidate: write-time annotation only, graduation agent reads ALL extensions
Anti-recurrence: agent checks closed graduation issues before re-flagging
Provider removal: manual cleanup + orphan detection in capmon check
Migration: all-at-once in same PR as capmon derive implementation
generation_method and notes: informational only, MUST NOT gate pipeline behavior
capmon validate-format-doc: v1 command, runs pre-commit and in capmon check Step 2
nextSteps: Create implementation plan for capmon pipeline (syllago-jtafb)
Implementation order: formatdoc.go types → derive.go → validate-format-doc → validate-sources → capmon check → capmon onboard → CI workflow → local skill updates
Migration: convert all 14 docs/provider-formats/*.md to *.yaml in same PR as capmon derive
Migration PR must include a validation test confirming new pipeline works end-to-end

context.notes: Audit is complete. The design doc status header says 'Design complete — panel-reviewed, ready for plan/implementation' — this is now accurate. The syllago-capmon-process skill was created in session 1. Workflow docs (update-format-doc.md, graduation-comparison.md) are fully spec'd in the design doc — extract verbatim during implementation.
